scripts.postinstall: npm run build --workspace @xiangqi-web/shared && npm run prisma:generate --workspace @xiangqi-web/server
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web,admin "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @xiangqi-web/shared && npm run build --workspace @xiangqi-web/server && npm run build --workspace @xiangqi-web/web && npm run build --workspace @xiangqi-web/admin
scripts.db:migrate: DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" npx prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/server/prisma/schema.prisma
